strongestIdea: Asymmetric Threshold Keeper: preserve the approved soft Santa concierge identity while improving silhouette/readability through warm asymmetry, useful hands, negative space, slight belly, and low-key concierge props.
uniquenessClaim: This lane diverges through shape language rather than outfit novelty: Otis stays canon, but the sprite reads less like a centered mannequin and more like a lived-in human threshold steward at small app scale.
qualityRisks: No image files were generated locally in this lane, so there is no visual preflight or pixel proof.
Previous parent probes failed native 4K and alpha/chroma requirements, so generation remains blocked until a source strategy passes preflight.
Open-hand threshold gestures can become theatrical or presenter-like if overposed.
Ledger variants can drift into generic accountant or office-clerk energy if Otis's Lobby warmth is not locked.
Winter-layered variants can drift into Santa costume or fantasy innkeeper if the charcoal/navy layer is not restrained.
fallbackReason: The requested GPT-5.5 fast mode with extra-high reasoning was not exposed as a selectable runtime in this session.
promotionBlockers: Prompt/art-direction packet only; not upload-ready production art.
Coordinator must generate probes with the approved Otis identity reference attached.
Generated sources must pass native 4096 px long-edge, transparency or flat-background, padding, hand/foot visibility, edge cleanliness, identity consistency, and app-scale readability checks.
Promotion remains locked to the parent pipeline and exact approved for app phrase.
